1618:     }
1619: 
1620:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1621:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1622:       return;
1623:     }
1624: 
1625:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1626:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1627:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1628:         true
1629:       );
1630:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1631: 
1632:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1633:         workspaceId,
1634:         errorCode: error.code,
1635:         errorMessage: error.message,
1636:         result: { rollback },
1637:       });
1638:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1639:         workspaceId,
1640:         deploymentId,
1641:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1642:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1643:       });
1644:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1645:         deploymentId,
1646:         status: 'failed',
1647:         errorCode: error.code,
1648:         errorMessage: error.message,
1649:       });
1650:       return;
1651:     }
1652: 
1653:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1654:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1655:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1656:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1657:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1658:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1659:         let cancelAcceptedByProvider = false;
1660:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1661:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1662: 
1663:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1664:           try {
1665:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1666:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1667:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1668:               workspaceId,
1669:               deploymentId,
1670:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1671:               payload: {
1672:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1673:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1674:                 retryPath: true,
1675:               },
1676:             });
1677:             if (cancel.accepted) {
1678:               cancelAcceptedByProvider = true;
1679:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1680:             } else {
1681:               await env.DB
1682:                 .prepare(
1683:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1684:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,

1686:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1687:                 )

1695:             }
1696:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1697:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1698:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1699:             }
1700:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1701:           }
1702:         }
1703: 
1704:         if (cancelAcceptedByProvider) {

<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1768:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1769:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1770:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1771:       return false;
1772:     }
1773: 
1774:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1775:       return false;
1776:     }
1777: 
1778:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1779:       return false;
1780:     }
1781: 
1782:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1783:       workspaceId,
1784:       startedAt: null,
1785:       finishedAt: null,
1786:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1787:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1788:     });
1789:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1790:       workspaceId,
1791:       deploymentId,
1792:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1793:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1794:     });
1795:     return true;
1796:   }
1797: 
1798:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1799:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1800:     try {
1801:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1802:     } catch (error) {
1803:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1804:         return;
1805:       }
1806: 
1807:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1808:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1809:         try {
1810:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1811:           if (recovered) {
1812:             continue;
1813:           }
1814:         } catch {
1815:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
1816:         }
1817:       }
1818:     }
1819: 
1820:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1821:     if (!latest) {
1822:       return;
1823:     }
1824:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1825:       return;
1826:     }
1827:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
1828:       continue;
1829:     }
1830:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1831:       return;
1832:     }
1833:   }
1834: }
1835: 
1836: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
1837:   env: Env,
1838:   workspaceId: string,
1839:   deploymentId: string
1840: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
1841:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1842:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
1843:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1844:       workspaceId,
1845:       deploymentId,
1846:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
1847:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
1848:     });
1849:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1850:       deploymentId,
1851:       status: 'cancelled',
1852:       errorCode: null,
1853:       errorMessage: null,
1854:     });
1855:   }
1856:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
1857:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1858:       workspaceId,
1859:       deploymentId,
1860:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
1861:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
1862:     });
1863:   }
1864:   return result;
1865: }
1866: 
1867: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
1868:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1869:     return true;
1870:   }
1871:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
1872:     return true;
1873:   }
1874: 
1875:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1876:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
1877: }

(End of file - total 1877 lines)

329:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {

338:       status: state,

347:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,

349:     );
350: 
351:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
352:       return { accepted: false };
353:     }
354: 
355:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
356:     return { accepted: true };
357:   }
358: }
359: 
360: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
361:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
362:     const normalizedInput = input.trim();
363:     if (normalizedInput === 'simulated' || normalizedInput === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
364:       return normalizedInput;
365:     }
366:   }
367: 
368:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
369:   if (configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
370:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
371:   }
372: 
373:   return 'simulated';
374: }
375: 
376: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env: Env): string | null {
377:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
378:   if (!configured || configured === 'simulated' || configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
379:     return null;
380:   }
381:   return `Invalid WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER value: ${configured}. Use simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets.`;
382: }
383: 
384: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
385:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
386:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
387:   }
388:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
389: }
390: 
391: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
392:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
393:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
394:   }
395: 
396:   if (error instanceof Error) {
397:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
398:   }
399: 
400:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
401: }

(End of file - total 401 lines)
</content>

2083:   db: D1Database,

2085:   deploymentId: string

2097:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)

2099:

2104:   db: D1Database,

2106:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2107:   options?: {
2108:     workspaceId?: string;
2109:     result?: unknown;
2110:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2111:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2112:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2113:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];

2122:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2123:   }
2124: ): Promise<void> {
2125:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2126:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2127:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2128: 
2129:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2130:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2131:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2132:   }
2133:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2134:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2135:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2136:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2137:   }
2138:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2139:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2140:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2141:   }
2142:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2143:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2144:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2145:   }
2146:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2147:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2148:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2149:   }
2150:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2151:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2152:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2153:   }
2154:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2155:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');

2157:   }
2158:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2159:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2160:     values.push(options.errorCode);

2162:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2163:     updates.push('error_message = ?');

2165:   }
2166:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {

2168:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2169:   }
2170:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2171:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');

2173:   }
2174:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2175:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2176:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);

2178:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2179:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2180:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);

2182:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2183:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2184:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2185:   }
2186: 
2187:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2188:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2189:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2190:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2191:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2192:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2193:     }
2194:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2195:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);

263:   async queue(batch: MessageBatch<unknown>, env: Env): Promise<void> {
264:     for (const message of batch.messages) {
265:       const body = message.body as Record<string, unknown> | null;
266:       const type = typeof body?.type === 'string' ? body.type : '';
267: 
268:       if (type === 'workspace_task_created') {
269:         let payload;
270:         try {
271:           payload = parseWorkspaceTaskQueueMessage(message.body);
272:         } catch (error) {
273:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
274:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
275:           continue;
276:         }
277: 
278:         try {
279:           await processWorkspaceTask(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.taskId);
280:         } catch (error) {
281:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
282:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
283:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceTaskError(error)) {
284:             message.retry();
285:           }
286:         }
287:         continue;
288:       }
289: 
290:       if (type === 'workspace_deployment_requested') {
291:         let payload;
292:         try {
293:           payload = parseWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(message.body);
294:         } catch (error) {
295:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
296:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
297:           continue;
298:         }
299:

301:           await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.deploymentId);
302:         } catch (error) {
303:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
304:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
305:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
306:             message.retry();
307:           }
308:         }
309:         continue;
310:       }
311:

313:       try {
314:         checkpointPayload = parseCheckpointJobQueueMessage(message.body);
315:       } catch (error) {
316:         const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
317:         console.error(`[checkpoint-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);

323:       } catch (error) {

state.title: packages/worker/src/index.ts

parts.text:
Found 1 blocking issue.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1575` now throws `QueueRetryError('...cancel requested while running...')` for `running + cancelRequestedAt`, which assumes a future redelivery will reconcile provider state.
- In inline mode (when `WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE` is unset), there is no redelivery. `runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries` exits as soon as status is still `running` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1824`), and `recoverInlineRunningDeployment` explicitly refuses to requeue when `cancelRequestedAt` is set (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1774`).
- Result: accepted-cancel deployments can remain `running` indefinitely in inline mode, i.e. still stuck.
- This is blocking because the fix relies on queue semantics but the codebase still supports inline execution paths.
